## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` passes
- [ ] New/changed behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Doc comments updated if public API changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `README.md` updated if a new package was added
